comments.author: tau-backlog
comments.text: Reproduced the /memories blank-error regression with a runtime test: when getEntriesSnapshot fails with MemoryFileError (for example an invalid JSONL entry such as an id that fails schema validation), the slash command caught the tagged error and called ctx.ui.notify(error.message), but MemoryFileError.message is empty. Fixed by formatting slash-command errors explicitly (MemoryFileError -> `Memory file error: <reason>`, otherwise fall back to error.message/String(error)). Added regression coverage in test/memory-tool-runtime.test.ts and verified with npm run gate in extensions/tau/.
